reason_for_removal: Remove bulky pre-operator legacy runtime, subject-kernel, and deterministic lab code from the current main working tree so EgoOperator remains the only default runtime owner and future AI/Codex routing is not polluted by old active-looking surfaces.

proves: the removed legacy code has a git rollback pointer
the current main working tree no longer needs the bulky legacy code directories as active surfaces
the reusable ideas are documented as reference-only inventory

authority_boundary.reuse_requirement: A new Stage Card and evidence gate are required before any archived legacy idea or code can influence runtime authority, task defaults, memory, approval, trace, transport, or proactive behavior.

rollback_instructions: Run the relevant verification for the restored branch or commit.
Do not treat restored code as runtime authority without a new Stage Card and evidence gate.
